{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220741488109A512FCB4A02288C5"}"},"total":56},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610316361601270553","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整体还是非常好看的，符合简介。结尾有点草率，还有一些小细节，或者说伏笔没有补充完整。比如说出现在黎鸠半年前演出上的那个人是谁？他要找的那个不知道是男是女的人又是谁？是死是活？还有那句“我来拿回属于我的东西”又是什么意思？哦，还有朱雨桐，扎维尔这些做任务的人，又是怎么回事？按照书中描述，应该是这个世界是一本书嗯，没太明白。希望作者可以出番外。期待ing"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771917786,"group_id":"7585569044812532761","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Kr7R7u3FXRT/lfpNoPCKroIGnD+kg+3SQLwDK92IdD","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fb8e5a7d0e4c48a183b7c664e710ce12~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702218&x-signature=q4AztR7Pl%2BeA9yZlD%2Fdn4zAB4ps%3D","user_id":"3648645998584746","user_name":"桥对岸的过路人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3648645998584746","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7585569044812532761","book_info":{"abstract":"【男主非好人+无后宫+无女主+日常+微血腥+轻松+无系统】
千人千面，观念不同，想法不同。
但大部分人都愿意为自己的心情买单。
而黎鸠认为，人类从自己的创作中收获快乐并没有错。
无论是惨烈的，悲痛的，恐怖的还是血腥的。
他立志于在世界上收获极致的快乐，为此，他能舍弃一些对他没用的东西。
比如，人性与道德。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of1f7cf941214718bc7d933a2aec30f38~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"南晨北月","author_id":"","book_id":"7585569044812532761","book_name":"杀人为乐？不，收获快乐没有错","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3346人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585569134591623705","read_count":"3346","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"228212"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.1","serial_count":"111","tags":"都市日常,都市,无女主,搞笑轻松,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of1f7cf941214718bc7d933a2aec30f38~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320508&x-signature=DYRQSg2%2FAeeRAauEQNNUhdJGEKU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4503228767550455","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"152"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220741488109A512FCB4A02288C5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":154,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22184,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1107},"user_action
